approach: Replace inline badge/dates bars with a structured header block rendered from spec-context.json, persist step clicks, strip raw metadata from markdown

specify.key_finding: Header HTML is generated in generator.ts with badge/dates rendered inline before markdown content; step clicks only send messages but don't persist to spec-context.json

plan.approach_summary: Replace inline badge/dates bars with a structured header block rendered from spec-context.json, persist step clicks, strip raw metadata from markdown
risks: Stripping metadata from markdown could break specs without spec-context.json — mitigate by only stripping when context data is available
Writing spec-context.json on every tab click introduces async I/O — mitigate by fire-and-forget write

T001.did: Added specName and branch optional fields to FeatureWorkflowContext interface

T002.did: Added deriveSpecName and getCurrentBranch helpers; updateStepProgress now populates specName and branch if missing

T003.did: Added getDocTypeLabel helper and updated computeBadgeText to append ... when substep is non-null

T004.did: Replaced badge-bar + dates-bar with structured .spec-header block via buildHeaderHtml helper

T005.did: Added specContextName, branch, filePath, docTypeLabel to NavState; passed context fields to generateHtml and sendContentUpdateMessage

T006.did: Added fire-and-forget updateStepProgress call in handleStepperClick

T007.did: Replaced old dates-bar/badge-bar patching with .spec-header updates (badge, date, title, file link)

T008.did: Added setHasSpecContext flag; preprocessSpecMetadata strips metadata block when context-driven; set flag on initial load and content updates

T009.did: Replaced old badge-bar/dates-bar CSS with structured header layout styles; badge now uses --header-title color

decisions: Kept selectedAt field — it tracks workflow assignment time, distinct from stepHistory.specify.startedAt
Used module-level hasSpecContext flag (same pattern as setCurrentTask) to pass context-driven flag to preprocessSpecMetadata
last_action: T009 complete — all Phase 1 tasks done, build and 132 tests pass
